setup: US Robinhood Crypto customers only — Robinhood Crypto Trading API
User sets RH_API_KEY + RH_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64 in Bankr → Agent tool environment (never in chat)
Gateway secret is public invite code — defaults in skill rh() helper
Max $50/order host ceiling; optional RH_MAX_ORDER_USD personal cap
Market orders only on pairs like BTC-USD — NOT contract addresses (0x…)
NOT Robinhood Chain / hoodmarkets — see references/WALLET-ROUTING.md
NOT Robinhood stocks — use Robinhood Agentic MCP for equities
Never post account_number or RH keys on X — references/RESPONSE-SAFETY.md
